창세기 17:1.content: When Abram was ninety-nine years old, Yahweh appeared to Abram and said to him, “I am God Almighty. Walk before me and be blameless.

창세기 17:2.content: I will make my covenant between me and you, and will multiply you exceedingly.”

창세기 17:3.content: Abram fell on his face. God talked with him, saying,

창세기 17:4.content: “As for me, behold, my covenant is with you. You will be the father of a multitude of nations.

창세기 17:5.content: Your name will no more be called Abram, but your name will be Abraham; for I have made you the father of a multitude of nations.

창세기 17:6.content: I will make you exceedingly fruitful, and I will make nations of you. Kings will come out of you.

창세기 17:7.content: I will establish my covenant between me and you and your offspring after you throughout their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be a God to you and to your offspring after you.

창세기 17:8.content: I will give to you, and to your offspring after you, the land where you are traveling, all the land of Canaan, for an everlasting possession. I will be their God.”

창세기 17:9.content: God said to Abraham, “As for you, you will keep my covenant, you and your offspring after you throughout their generations.

창세기 17:10.content: This is my covenant, which you shall keep, between me and you and your offspring after you. Every male among you shall be circumcised.

창세기 17:11.content: You shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskin. It will be a token of the covenant between me and you.

창세기 17:12.content: He who is eight days old will be circumcised among you, every male throughout your generations, he who is born in the house, or bought with money from any foreigner who is not of your offspring.

창세기 17:13.content: He who is born in your house, and he who is bought with your money, must be circumcised. My covenant will be in your flesh for an everlasting covenant.

창세기 17:14.content: The uncircumcised male who is not circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin, that soul shall be cut off from his people. He has broken my covenant.”

창세기 17:15.content: God said to Abraham, “As for Sarai your wife, you shall not call her name Sarai, but her name will be Sarah.

창세기 17:16.content: I will bless her, and moreover I will give you a son by her. Yes, I will bless her, and she will be a mother of nations. Kings of peoples will come from her.”

창세기 17:17.content: Then Abraham fell on his face, and laughed, and said in his heart, “Will a child be born to him who is one hundred years old? Will Sarah, who is ninety years old, give birth?”

창세기 17:18.content: Abraham said to God, “Oh that Ishmael might live before you!”

창세기 17:19.content: God said, “No, but Sarah, your wife, will bear you a son. You shall call his name Isaac. I will establish my covenant with him for an everlasting covenant for his offspring after him.

창세기 17:20.content: As for Ishmael, I have heard you. Behold, I have blessed him, and will make him fruitful, and will multiply him exceedingly. He will become the father of twelve princes, and I will make him a great nation.

창세기 17:21.content: But I will establish my covenant with Isaac, whom Sarah will bear to you at this set time next year.”

창세기 17:22.content: When he finished talking with him, God went up from Abraham.

창세기 17:23.content: Abraham took Ishmael his son, all who were born in his house, and all who were bought with his money: every male among the men of Abraham’s house, and circumcised the flesh of their foreskin in the same day, as God had said to him.

창세기 17:24.content: Abraham was ninety-nine years old when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

창세기 17:25.content: Ishmael, his son, was thirteen years old when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

창세기 17:26.content: In the same day both Abraham and Ishmael, his son, were circumcised.

창세기 17:27.content: All the men of his house, those born in the house, and those bought with money from a foreigner, were circumcised with him.
